payload.answer: Compiled durable Brain architecture decisions and preserved the two unresolved questions as open questions.
citations: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
Open questions: Should Telegram be added later?
Which model is cheapest while saturating performance?

entity_resolution.reason: The input provides architectural facts and open questions about the Brain personal memory system without enough prior entity context to bind to an existing entity ID.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the Brain personal memory system.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection of Brain DB, not the source of truth.

relationships.object: strict memory intake agent for Brain
relationships.subject: Slack

memory_cards.statement: Slack should act as a strict memory intake agent for Brain.
It is unresolved whether Telegram should be added later as part of the Brain architecture.
It is unresolved which model is cheapest while saturating performance for the Brain system.

details: Committed Brain DB as source of truth.
Committed Cognee as rebuildable semantic projection.
Committed Slack as strict memory intake agent.
